name: Antigravity CLI
description: Installs Google's Antigravity CLI (agy) and mounts local config files from the host.

rulefilePath.description: Path to the central rules file, relative to the workspace root. Set to 'none' or leave empty to disable symlinking.

contextPath.description: Path to the path-scoped instructions directory, relative to the workspace root. Set to 'none' or leave empty to disable context mapping.

skillsPath.description: Path to the modular skills directory, relative to the workspace root. Set to 'none' or leave empty to disable skills mapping.
